name: HDFC Bank Regalia Gold Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: Up to 10X Reward Points (50 RP / Rs 200 spent via SmartBuy)
Up to 5X Reward Points (25 RP / Rs 200 spent via SmartBuy)
Up to 5X Reward Points (25 RP / Rs 200 spent on instant vouchers via SmartBuy)
3X Reward Points (15 RP / Rs 200 spent via SmartBuy)

domestic: 12 complimentary visits per year (max 3 per quarter).
From 1 July 2026 access is spend-gated: requires Rs 60,000 of spend in the preceding calendar quarter to unlock the next quarter.
international: Complimentary Priority Pass membership on request after 4 retail transactions.
6 complimentary visits per calendar year outside India (primary and add-on cardholders); extra visits charged at US $27 + GST.

specialSpendRules.notes: Grocery spends earn rewards capped at 2,00,000 total cycle cap, but specifically capped at 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month for grocery spends.
Utility spends earn rewards capped at 2,00,000 total cycle cap, but specifically capped at 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month for utility and telecom categories individually.
Insurance spends earn rewards capped at 2,00,000 total cycle cap, but specifically capped at 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month for insurance spends (effective 1 July 2025).
Education payments can earn rewards subject to current HDFC terms

milestones.label: Rs 5,000 worth flight vouchers on spends of Rs 5 lakh
Rs 5,000 worth flight vouchers on spends of Rs 7.5 lakh
Rs 1,500 worth Myntra or Nykaa vouchers on quarterly spends of Rs 1.5 lakh

milestoneBenefits: Rs 5,000 worth flight vouchers on spends of Rs 5 lakh
Rs 5,000 worth flight vouchers on spends of Rs 7.5 lakh
Rs 1,500 worth Myntra or Nykaa vouchers on quarterly spends of Rs 1.5 lakh
Renewal fee waived on annual spends of Rs 4 lakh

joiningBenefitsValued.label: Complimentary Swiggy One and MMTBLACK Gold membership as welcome benefits on spends of Rs 1 lakh in first 90 days

joiningBenefits: Complimentary Swiggy One and MMTBLACK Gold membership as welcome benefits on spends of Rs 1 lakh in first 90 days
additionalBenefits: Boarding Edge Programme: Upload boarding pass on SmartBuy to choose 2 complimentary perks per quarter (spa session, buffet, room upgrade, or Rs 750 Uber voucher)
Dining privileges via Swiggy Dineout with up to 25% savings
additionalDetails: Reward Points earnings are capped at 50,000 per statement cycle
Reward Points on grocery transactions are capped at 2,000 per calendar month
Reward Points on utility transactions are capped at 2,000 per calendar month
Reward Points on telecom transactions are capped at 2,000 per calendar month
Reward Points on insurance transactions are capped at 2,000 per calendar month (effective 1 July 2025)
Redemption of reward points for flights and hotel bookings on SmartBuy is capped at 50,000 per calendar month

transferPartnerValuations.note: 2 reward points → 1 Accor ALL point · Rs 2.2/point
3 reward points → 1 Marriott point · avg Rs 0.6/point

salaried: Net monthly income greater than Rs 1 lakh for government employees
Net monthly income greater than Rs 1.5 lakh for non-government employees
selfEmployed: ITR greater than Rs 18 lakh per annum

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-05-30
Joining/Renewal fee is Rs 2,500 + taxes, with renewal fee waived on Rs 4 Lakh spends in 12 months.
Reward Points earning is capped at 50,000 per statement cycle.
Base rewards rate is 5 Reward Points for every Rs 200 spent on retail spends (effective 15 May 2026). Prior to this, it was 4 Reward Points / Rs 150.
5X Reward Points (25 RP / Rs 200) on Myntra, Nykaa, Marks & Spencer, and Reliance Digital, capped at 5,000 Reward Points per month across these brands combined.
SmartBuy reward caps: 2,000 bonus Reward Points per day and 4,000 bonus Reward Points per month.
SmartBuy multipliers: 10X (50 RP / Rs 200) on hotels, PharmEasy, Jockey, and IGP; 5X (25 RP / Rs 200) on flights and Gyftr instant vouchers; 3X (15 RP / Rs 200) on trains via ConfirmTkt.
Reward Points on grocery transactions are capped at 2,00,000 total cycle cap, but specifically capped at 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month for grocery spends.

Reward Points on utility and telecom transactions are capped at 2,00,000 total cycle cap, but specifically capped at 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month for utility and telecom categories individually.
Reward Points on insurance transactions have a maximum cap of 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month (effective 1 July 2025).
No reward points are earned on online skill-based gaming transactions and wallet loading (excluding PayZapp) (effective 1 July 2025).

No reward points are earned on education payments made through third-party apps like CRED, Cheq, MobiKwik, etc. (effective 1 September 2024); direct school/college website or POS transactions do earn rewards.
A 1.75% markup fee (effective 15 May 2026) is charged on all transactions carried out in Indian Currency at international locations or with merchants registered overseas (DCC / Overseas Markup).

Complimentary domestic lounge access (12 visits per year, 3 per quarter) is spend-based starting 1 July 2026: Requires spending Rs 60,000 in the preceding calendar quarter to unlock access for the next quarter.

Complimentary Priority Pass membership is available on request after completing 4 retail transactions on the card. Offers 6 complimentary international lounge visits per calendar year outside India (for primary and add-on cardholders). Visits exceeding the complimentary limit will be charged at US $27 + GST per visit.
Boarding Edge Programme (new as of May 2026): Upload boarding pass on SmartBuy to choose 2 complimentary perks per quarter (spa session, buffet, room upgrade, or Rs 750 Uber voucher).
Redemption: 1 Reward Point = Rs 0.50 for flights/hotels via SmartBuy or Air Miles transfer, and 1 Reward Point = Rs 0.20 for statement cashback.
